narrative: Strait of Hormuz supply disruptions drive a geopolitical risk premium as WTI surges +3.46% to $105.5; USD/JPY firms to 157.28 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage offsets marginal risk-premium flows. Dollar strength persists with USD/NZD emerging as the dominant G8 bilateral theme (spread 0.979%) on a 150bp carry spread; gold lower -2.46% near $4,530; equities -0.67%; DXY +0.29%; VIX 18.4. Watch RBA Rate Decision at 04:30 UTC tomorrow.
